name: analytic-pulse
description: Plataforma open source de observabilidade — Analytic Pulse

scripts.build:api: npm run build -w @analytic-pulse/shared && npm run build -w @analytic-pulse/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @analytic-pulse/shared && npm run build -w @analytic-pulse/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @analytic-pulse/shared && npm run build -w @analytic-pulse/api && npm run build -w @analytic-pulse/web
scripts.build:sdk: npm run build -w @analytic-pulse/shared && npm run build -w @analytic-pulse/sdk
scripts.build:cli: npm run build:sdk && npm run build -w @analytic-pulse/cli
